title: Ramship
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''ramship''' was a term used to refer to [[Starship/Legends|starships]] used for the sole purpose of [[Ramming/Legends|ramming]] other vessels during space battles. Most ramships were built from the frame of standard starships though their interiors would be packed with explosives. Due to the highly dangerous profile of the mission, few [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] would [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] these craft and many were entirely automated like [[robot ramship]]s.

Ramships were often deployed by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and occasionally rogue [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] governments like the [[Sacorrian Triad]] during the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|Battle]] over [[Centerpoint Station]] in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]] which utilized modified [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]]. Throughout the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders would occasionally ram vessels into enemy targets including spacecraft, [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] stations and even planetary surfaces particularly during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|conquest]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. [[Ssi-ruu]]vi [[Fw'Sen-class picket ship]] could also double as ramships.
